title: Bonnaya antipoda
taxonomy: Bonnaya antipoda is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. The genus Bonnaya is part of the tribe Spermacoceae. This plant is a type of flowering plant native to New Caledonia. It is closely related to other species within the same family, particularly those in the genera Psychotria and Spermacoce. The classification of Bonnaya antipoda is still being studied and refined by botanists.

intro: Bonnaya antipoda, also known as Bonnaya, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent, making it beneficial in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Bonnaya antipoda include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
